subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Ḥusayn! Upon thee be My Glory! Thy letter hath reached Us and been perused, and We have hearkened unto thy cry, and with this Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الحسین علیک بهائی نامه ات رسید ملاحظه شد ندایت را شنیدیم و باین لوح
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
